title: Zeta (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|disambiguating "Zeta"|[[Zeta-class shuttle (disambiguation)|disambiguation of ''Zeta''-class shuttle]] or [[Zeta Squadron (disambiguation)|Zeta Squadron]]}}
'''Zeta''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Battle Plan Zeta]]''', a tactic used by [[General]] [[Kalani]]
*"[[Longshot (pilot)|Longshot]]," a [[pilot]] also known as '''Zeta Ace'''
*'''[[Station Zeta]]''', a [[space station]]
*'''[[Zeta]]''', a [[Z7 series]] [[construction droid]]
*'''[[Zeta Leader]]''', the [[callsign]] of [[Zeta Squadron]]'s leader, [[Jad Bean]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Attack Pattern Zeta-Gamma One]]''', a tactic used by the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]] that favored [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and firepower over speed
*'''[[Attack Formation Zeta Nine]]''', a tactic used by the Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps that favored shields over firepower
*'''[[Mentor Assassin Zeta]]''', an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]
*[[Galen Marek|'''Subject Zeta''']], the name given to the secret apprentice of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] while he was on board the ''[[Empirical]]''
*'''[[Systems Army Zeta]]''' of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
*The '''[[TIS Zeta 19]]''' [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]
*The '''[[Zeta 0-9 system/Legends|Zeta 0-9 system]]''', a [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*'''[[Z-19|Zeta One Nine]]''', a [[skimmer/Legends|skimmer]] of [[Patrol 341]].
*'''''[[Zeta Five]]'''''
*'''[[Zeta Group]]'''
*'''[[Zeta Hangar]]'''
*The '''[[Zeta One Heavy Ion Cannon]]''', a [[Starship/Legends|starship]]-mounted [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]]
*'''[[Zeta Magnus]]''', [[prime clone]] of the [[Accelerated Transgenic Heuristic Abhorer]]s
*'''[[Zeta Traal]]''', an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]]
*'''[[Zeta Squad]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]]
*'''[[Zeta Zero Nine]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]
{{Disambig}}
{{Interlang
|ja=ゼータ
}}
